title: Art appraisers in Raleigh, North Carolina

location.name: Art appraisers in Raleigh, North Carolina

listedAppraisers.name: Dana Summitt (Look Appraisal LLC)
listedAppraisers.description: Dana Summitt (Look Appraisal LLC) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in 20th Century Art, Contemporary American Paintings, Modern/Contemporary Prints, Photography, Rare Books, Vintage Clothing. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
